verdict_after: PASS_LOW (0 BLOCKER · 0 HIGH · 1 MEDIUM · 1 LOW) — pending re-render
summary: All BLOCKER and HIGH findings addressed in source files. WCAG AA now 100% pass (was 7 failures). Pacing beats added to 9 scenes. CTA element renamed to canonical id='cta-question' and font bumped to 40px. Script.txt cleaned of unsourced claims and TTS pronunciation issues. youtube-description.md scaffolded with vidIQ-driven keywords. Re-render required to bake the visual changes into a new MP4; TTS regen required to bake the script changes into audio.

BLOCKER.summary: youtube-description.md created with full canonical structure
BLOCKER.details: SEO hook front-loads 'Claude Code', 'AI coding', 'complex codebases'. Combined Dynamous+Hostinger ---- block (Dynamous first, affiliate disclosure intact). 14 chapters with SEO-keyword-front-loaded titles. Body bullets + Resources + engagement question 'Vertical slices, or shared test folders — which one are you running today?' matching spoken+visual. 24 hashtags (within 15-25 cap). All URLs validated (anthropic redirect resolved to code.claude.com/docs/en/best-practices).

Line 1: 'Ninety-seven engineers' → 'Dozens of engineers'. Line 5 + 17: 'fifty thousand tokens' → 'tens of thousands of tokens'. Line 25: verbatim Anthropic quote 'Sub-agents are used to split exploration from editing' → paraphrase 'Anthropic's own guidance...points to the same pattern. Split exploration from editing.' Also reworked 'ninety-minute live workshop' → 'ninety-minute interactive workshop' (fixes heteronym risk simultaneously). NOTE: cascades to TTS regen + re-render — current narration.wav/MP4 still contain the old wording.

HIGH.summary: Pacing beats added to 11 scenes — closes static-tail gaps from 42.75s down to within the 5s cap
HIGH.details: Each scene now has 2-5 informational beats paced to narration word anchors. Examples: vsa-tree retimed rows to land during 'Models. Schemas. Routes...' staccato (was prebuilt by t=8.45s); worktrees has sequential edge glow + isolation pulse + merge-direction pulse; cta has sequential offering check-mark highlights instead of bulk decoration.

HIGH.summary: Card-word-anchor drifts fixed — cards now enter at narration anchors not 7-11s ahead
HIGH.details: context-tiers: tiers retimed to 8.6/15.84/20.56s (was 1.5/6.5/11.5). prime-family: rows retimed to 2.0/13.0/16.0/19.0/22.0 (was 2/5/8/11/14). vsa-tree: file rows retimed to 25.5-30.5 staccato block (was 3-8s).

HIGH.summary: WCAG AA contrast — .cost token labels in scene-big-stat fixed
HIGH.details: Changed color from var(--accent-warn) #F97316 to #FB923C; bumped font-weight 600→700 for additional safety. Validate now passes all 6 .cost instances.

HIGH.summary: WCAG AA contrast — .qn question labels in scene-coupling fixed
HIGH.details: Changed color from var(--accent) to var(--accent-2) (#60A5FA). Validate now passes.

HIGH.summary: Engagement CTA visual element renamed to canonical id='cta-question'
HIGH.details: Renamed #ec-debate → #cta-question across CSS selector, HTML id, and all 4 GSAP refs (set + 3 tweens). Element class can be re-added later if any external selector references ec-debate.

HIGH.summary: CTA question font bumped 30px → 40px (above 36px long-form minimum)
HIGH.details: Also tightened line-height from 1.3 to 1.25 to fit the larger size without breaking the card grid.

MEDIUM.summary: TTS: API → 'A P I' in script.txt (2 occurrences)
MEDIUM.details: Lines 17 and 23. Effect on next TTS regen.

MEDIUM.summary: TTS: dynamous.ai → 'dynamous dot AI' in script.txt
MEDIUM.details: Line 27 closing line. Effect on next TTS regen.
Same edit as B-2 paragraph 1 rework — single fix covers both findings.
Moved out of compositions/ into compositions/_unused/.
3 keyword seeds + outlier scan saved. Drove first-200-char keyword choices, chapter titles, and hashtag list in youtube-description.md.

MEDIUM.summary: transcript.json is empty and captions.html has no caption groups
MEDIUM.status: ATTEMPTED — npx hyperframes transcribe failed on whisper.exe model invocation. User can retry manually; not render-blocking.
MEDIUM.fix: npx hyperframes transcribe videos/scaling-ai-coding-complex-codebases (or run audio/narration.wav through whisper directly)

LOW.summary: index.html is 389 lines — advisory lint warning only, no render impact

what_still_needs_to_happen: 1. Re-render the MP4 to bake in the visual fixes (pacing beats, WCAG colors, CTA rename, font bump). Command: npx hyperframes render videos/scaling-ai-coding-complex-codebases -o videos/scaling-ai-coding-complex-codebases/out/scaling-ai-coding-complex-codebases.mp4 --docker

2. Decide whether to regenerate the narration audio to bake in the script edits (softened claims, TTS pronunciation fixes). If yes: npx hyperframes tts videos/scaling-ai-coding-complex-codebases — then run transcribe afterward, then re-render.
3. If script audio is regenerated, also update on-screen text in scene-workshop-intro.html to match (currently still shows '97 engineers'). Script.txt now says 'Dozens of engineers'.
4. Validate the YouTube description URL list one more time before publish (anthropic URL was updated to code.claude.com/docs/en/best-practices).

verification.validate: 0 console errors, 87 text elements pass WCAG AA (was 80 pass + 7 fail)
